title.en: SYSTEMS ACTING BY MEANS OF FLUIDS IN GENERAL; FLUID-PRESSURE ACTUATORS, e.g. SERVOMOTORS; DETAILS OF FLUID-PRESSURE SYSTEMS, NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR
Installations or systems with accumulators; Supply reservoir or sump assemblies
Installations or systems with accumulators
Supply reservoir or sump assemblies
Intensifiers or fluid-pressure converters, e.g. pressure exchangers; Conveying pressure from one fluid system to another, without contact between the fluids {(fluid-driven pumps F04B9/08)}

Transducers converting variations of physical quantities, e.g. expressed by variations in positions of members, into fluid-pressure variations or vice versa; Varying fluid pressure as a function of variations of a plurality of fluid pressures or variations of other quantities (F15B9/00 takes precedence)
{characterised by variation of the pressure in a nozzle or the like, e.g. nozzle-flapper system}
{with electrical means, e.g. electropneumatic transducer (F15B5/003 takes precedence)}

{with rotary output}

In which the ratio between pump stroke and motor stroke varies with the resistance against the motor
